description_long: This object is a rectangular stone block with a flat top surface featuring alternating black and gray horizontal stripes, giving it a visually striking, modern appearance. The stripes are evenly spaced and run parallel across the entire top face, while the sides of the block are solid black, providing a stark contrast to the patterned top. The block has sharp, clean edges and a uniform thickness, suggesting it is precisely cut and manufactured. The surface texture of the gray stripes appears slightly marbled, indicating a stone or concrete material, while the black areas are matte and non-reflective. The block is solid and heavy, likely intended as a barrier or obstacle in an urban environment such as a sidewalk, plaza, or park. There are no visible engravings, markings, or signs of significant weathering, and the block appears to be in excellent condition.
description: A rectangular stone block with alternating black and marbled gray stripes on the top and solid black sides, featuring sharp edges and a modern, clean appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the striped top surface with horizontal black and gray lines and a solid black front face.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the block and the continuation of the striped pattern across the top, with a solid black side face.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, displaying the striped top and a solid black rear face.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the striped top and a solid black side face.
attribute_location_context: urban sidewalk or plaza as a decorative barrier or seating element
attribute_installation_method: set in concrete or placed on a leveled surface
attribute_weathering_pattern: no visible weathering; surfaces appear clean and well-maintained
attribute_integration_with_surrounding_s: isolated or aligned in a row with similar blocks
